sections.title: 1. General Provisions
content: This Disclaimer governs the use of information published on the GoTiva website.
By using this website, the User confirms that they have read and accepted the terms of this Disclaimer.
The information published on the website is provided for informational purposes only.

sections.title: 2. Accuracy of Information
content: The Company strives to ensure that the information published on the website is accurate and up to date.
However, information regarding tours, itineraries, prices, visa requirements, schedules, and service availability may change without prior notice.
The Company does not guarantee the completeness, accuracy, or timeliness of all information published on the website.

sections.title: 3. Travel Risks
content: Travel may be affected by circumstances beyond the Company's control, including weather conditions, transportation restrictions, legislative changes, public health requirements, and other factors.
Users are solely responsible for evaluating the risks associated with travel and deciding whether to book travel services.
The Company shall not be liable for events beyond its reasonable control.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Services
content: The website may contain information about services provided by third-party tour operators, carriers, hotels, excursion companies, and other service providers.
The Company is not responsible for the quality, safety, availability, or performance of obligations by such third parties.
Relationships between Users and third-party providers are governed by the providers' own terms and policies.

sections.title: 5. External Links
content: The website may contain links to third-party websites and online resources.
The Company does not control the content of such resources and is not responsible for any information, products, or services offered by third-party websites.
Users access external links at their own risk.

sections.title: 6. Website Availability
content: The Company does not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation of the website.
The website may be temporarily unavailable due to technical maintenance, updates, or other reasons.
The Company reserves the right to modify website functionality, update content, or remove sections without prior notice.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Company shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use the website.
The Company shall not be responsible for decisions made by Users based on information published on the website.
Users access and use the website and its content entirely at their own risk.

sections.title: 8. Contact Information
content: For questions regarding this Disclaimer, Users may contact us at: info@gotiva.pro.
The current version of this document is available at: https://gotour.pro/disclaimer.
